ground_truth_text: MUTUAL NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT This Non-Disclosure Agreement ('Agreement') is entered into by and between Acme Corporation, located at Bangalore, Karnataka, and John Doe, residing in Mumbai, Maharashtra. Aadhaar Number of John Doe is 1234-5678-9012. PAN card is ABCDE1234F. Phone: +91 98765 43210. Email: john.doe@example.com. The parties agree to keep all proprietary business information confidential. Any leak of these private documents will lead to legal action.
